topic: VO2 max: the ultimate aerobic capacity biomarker
caption: Discover the secret to unlocking your endurance potential! 💪 VO2 max is the ultimate biomarker for aerobic capacity. Here are 5 science-backed facts: 📊 1) VO2 max is the maximum amount of oxygen your body can utilize during intense exercise. 🏃‍♀️ 2) It's a strong predictor of cardiovascular health and longevity. ❤️ 3) Regular exercise can increase VO2 max by up to 20%. 🚀 4) VO2 max declines with age, but targeted training can slow this decline. 🕰️ 5) Elite athletes typically have a high VO2 max, but it's not the only factor in determining athletic success. 🏆 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to boost their endurance. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 🙏 #VO2max #AerobicCapacity #EnduranceTraining #CardiovascularHealth #FitnessMotivation #AthleticPerformance #Longevity
